channel.title: Multi-Tenancy on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Multi-Tenancy on Pi Stack

item.title: vCluster vs Capsule vs Loft: Kubernetes Namespace & Virtual Cluster Management 2026
item.description: Running multiple teams, environments, or workloads on a single Kubernetes cluster requires careful isolation. Standard Kubernetes namespaces provide basic segmentation, but they fall short when teams need their own control plane, custom resource definitions, or independent RBAC policies. This is where virtual cluster and namespace management solutions come in.
